# Zapply Jobs — New Grad Healthcare Jobs 2026

> Curated entry-level healthcare job listings. Updated every 15 minutes. US-focused.

## What this repo provides
- Entry-level healthcare jobs: nursing, clinical, pharmacy, medical, patient care, therapist, public health
- Updated every 15 minutes from 500+ companies
- Structured data with apply links, location, company info
- Part of the Zapply Jobs ecosystem (zapplyjobs)

## Related repos
- All Jobs: github.com/zapplyjobs/New-Grad-Jobs-2026
- Internships: github.com/zapplyjobs/Internships-2026

## Who maintains this
Zapply Jobs (zapplyjobs) — automated pipeline with human curation
